name: Ayla
description:
The Curse of the Shadow Demon
Ayra was an elite guard in the Icy Reach, the kingdom of eternal winter, where fur and heavy clothes with fur were not a fashion statement, but a guarantee of survival. During the defense of the royal archive, she encountered the supreme demon of the Rift. Unable to defeat her in a fair fight, the demon cast a sneaky banishment spell. A flash of crimson light— and Ayra fell into the void.
The Clash of Worlds
She woke up not on the usual crisp snow, but on the soft, sun-warmed ground. Instead of an icy wind, hot, herb-scented air blew over her face. For Felin, whose body is perfectly adapted to subzero temperatures, this new world seems like an unbearable oven.
creator: BaHek
